Privacy
Policy

Effective Date: November 9, 2025

This Privacy Policy describes how Investors POV LLC, a Florida limited liability company with its principal place of business at 8640 NW 10 PL, Plantation, Florida 33322 ("Investors POV", "we", "us", "our") collects, stores, uses, and protects personal information that you provide when accessing our website or any landing pages we operate on third-party platforms.

By using our website or services, you agree to the terms of this Privacy Policy. Continued use after updates constitutes acceptance.

Legal Basis for Processing

We process personal information based on one or more of the following legal grounds:

  • Your consent
  • Performance of a contract
  • Compliance with legal obligations
  • Legitimate business interests (including improving our Services, reducing fraud risks, and operating marketing systems)

Information We Collect

We may collect personal information that you voluntarily submit, including: Name, Email address, Billing address, Payment information (processed securely via third-party processors), and Account/login credentials.

We may also collect automatically through cookies, pixels, and logs: IP address, Device type, Browser type, Session data, Pages viewed & content interactions.

Data Retention

We retain personal information only as long as necessary to provide services and access, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce agreements.

Cookies & Tracking Technologies

We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to personalize content, analyze traffic, and improve user experience. We may use third-party cookies for advertising and analytics. You can manage or disable cookies via your browser settings.

How We Use Information

We may use the information we collect to process purchases, provide course & community access, send email communications, conduct analytics and advertising, and send abandoned cart reminders.

We may share data with trusted service providers including payment processors (Stripe, PayPal), email/automation (Kajabi), analytics/ads (Google, Meta), and CRM and hosting platforms.

Data Sharing

We do not sell or rent personal information. We share data only with service providers who process data on our behalf under confidentiality agreements.

Email Communications & Unsubscribe Rights

You may unsubscribe from marketing emails at any time using the unsubscribe link in emails or by contacting us. Transactional emails (e.g. receipts, account access messages) cannot be opted-out.

Children's Privacy

Our services are not directed to children under age 13. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children under 13.

GDPR — If Applicable

If you are in the EEA, you may request: access, corrections, deletion ("Right to be Forgotten"), restriction, and portability. Submit requests to: investorspovoffice@gmail.com

California Resident Rights (CCPA)

If you are a California resident, you may request: disclosure of personal information collected, deletion, and opt-out of sale/sharing (we do not sell personal data).

Security Measures

We use SSL encryption, secure storage, and limited-access protocols. No system is 100% secure — we cannot guarantee absolute protection.

Changes to this Policy

We may update this policy at any time. The revised Effective Date will reflect changes.

Contact

Investors POV LLC · 8640 NW 10 PL · Plantation, Florida 33322
Email: investorspovoffice@gmail.com

Refund
Policy

Effective Date: November 9, 2025

This Refund Policy applies to all digital products, courses, subscriptions, and memberships sold by Investors Point of View LLC, a Florida limited liability company.

Money-Back Guarantee

We want you to feel confident in your purchase. If you change your mind for any reason, we offer a full money-back guarantee subject to the following terms:

  • Eligibility: Refund requests must be submitted within 30 days of the purchase date.
  • Course Progress: A refund is available only if you have viewed no more than two chapters.
  • Full Access Policy: If you have completed the majority or entirety of the course, no refund will be issued.
  • How to Apply: Send your refund request to office@investorspov.com
  • Processing Time: Approved refunds will be credited back to your original payment method within 14 business days.

Subscriptions & Recurring Billing

Subscription products renew automatically unless canceled. Cancelation stops future billing only — it does not generate refunds for past charges.

Chargebacks & Disputes

Attempting to dispute a charge with your payment provider after receiving access to content or community violates our Terms & Conditions. We reserve the right to revoke access and/or pursue recovery of losses in such cases.

Legal Exception

Where required by applicable law, we will comply with any mandatory refund obligations.

Contact

Investors Point of View LLC · 8640 NW 10 PL · Plantation, Florida 33322
Email: office@investorspov.com

Earnings
Disclaimer

Effective Date: November 9, 2025

This Earnings & Results Disclaimer is provided by Investors Point of View LLC, a Florida limited liability company.

No Earnings Projections or Promises

Every effort has been made to accurately present our programs and their potential. However, Investors POV makes no guarantees that you will earn any money or achieve any particular results using the ideas, strategies, or tools we share in our courses, community, newsletters, or any related materials.

Educational Purpose Only — Not Financial Advice

All content is provided for educational and informational purposes only and does not constitute financial, investment, legal, tax, or accounting advice. We are not registered as an investment adviser with the SEC or any state regulator.

You should consult your own licensed financial advisor, tax professional, and/or attorney before making any financial decisions.

Affiliate Disclosure

We may receive commissions, affiliate income, or other compensation from certain links, products, or services mentioned. This does not affect our opinions or recommendations.

Your Results Depend on You

Any outcomes depend entirely on factors specific to you, including your time commitment, capital, risk tolerance, experience, skills, discipline, market conditions, and execution. Because these factors vary by individual, we cannot and do not guarantee your success or income level.

Past Performance

Any examples of trades, portfolios, gains, losses, backtests, simulations, or case studies are illustrative and not typical. Past performance is not indicative of future results.

Market Risks

Trading and investing — whether in equities, ETFs, options, futures, cryptoassets, or any financial instrument — involve substantial risk of loss and are not suitable for every investor. Do not risk capital you cannot afford to lose.

Regulatory Authority Disclaimer

Investors POV LLC is not affiliated with or endorsed by any regulatory authority, including the SEC, FINRA, or CFTC.

Limitation of Liability

Under no circumstances shall Investors POV LLC or its members, managers, or affiliates be liable for any direct or indirect loss, damage, or expense arising from reliance on any information provided in our materials, courses, community, or platforms.

Governing Law

This Disclaimer shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Florida, USA.

Contact

Email: investorspovoffice@gmail.com

Terms &
Conditions

Effective Date: November 9, 2025

This website and any additional landing pages operated by us are owned and operated by Investors POV LLC, a Florida limited liability company ("Investors POV", "we", "us", "our"). By accessing the Site or any of our Services, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions.

We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Continued use of the Site after changes are posted constitutes acceptance.

Intellectual Property

All content, materials, videos, lessons, frameworks, designs, branding, text, graphics, audio, code, and digital assets are the exclusive property of Investors POV LLC, protected by U.S. and international intellectual property laws. You may not copy, redistribute, resell, or create derivative works without written permission.

Online Commerce & Third-Party Platforms

Payments and access to Services may be facilitated through third-party systems (Kajabi, Stripe, PayPal, Discord, etc.). All billing is processed securely via third-party payment providers. Investors POV LLC does not store or access full payment details.

Subscriptions & Memberships

Monthly subscription products renew automatically until canceled. Customers may cancel at any time via their account dashboard or by contacting us at investorspovoffice@gmail.com. Cancelation stops future charges — no refunds apply to past charges.

Lifetime Access Definition

"Lifetime access" means access for the lifetime of the product OR for the lifetime of the commercial operation of that product — whichever ends first. We cannot be responsible for third-party platform shutdowns or policy changes.

Refund Policy

  • Eligibility: Refund requests must be submitted within 30 days of the purchase date.
  • Course Progress: A refund is available only if you have viewed no more than two chapters.
  • Full Access Policy: If you have completed the majority or entirety of the course, no refund will be issued.
  • How to Apply: Send your refund request to office@investorspov.com
  • Processing Time: Approved refunds will be credited back to your original payment method within 14 business days.

No Investment Advice

Investors POV LLC is NOT a registered investment advisor, broker-dealer, or financial advisor. Nothing provided by Investors POV LLC constitutes personalized investment advice or recommendations to buy or sell securities. Past performance is not indicative of future results. You are solely responsible for all financial decisions you make.

User Conduct

You may not violate any law, harass or abuse others, distribute unauthorized content, share login credentials, resell our content, upload malware, or impersonate Investors POV. We may revoke access without refund for violations.

Governing Law & Mandatory Arbitration

These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Florida, USA. All disputes shall be resolved exclusively through binding arbitration administered by the American Arbitration Association (AAA). Class actions are strictly prohibited.

Limitation of Liability

Under no circumstances shall our total liability exceed the amount you paid for the specific product or service giving rise to the claim.
